TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Kari_Han-guk, title = Kari_Han-guk, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kari_Han-guk} }

S.FORM: Kari Han-guk (Kari Hanguk:ŪēúÍĶ≠žĖī/ťüďŚúčŤ™ě Hanguk-eo) uxe de kesun daha Kari Cyoson we (Kari Cyoson:ž°įžĄ†Žßź/śúĚťģģŽßź Chos«ín-mal), kari qnlhangan na Tehan Mingguk (Han-guk) daha ka Cyoson Minjujuwi Yinmin Kunghwaguk (Cyoson). 7560 mang kana hei ka tnkari Han-guk/Cyoson, tg13 snpegan bobo dheran nii. Egu riyung seediq bobo dheran prading smluhe Kari Han-guk, anu ka kndudul mrana ka beyax na Tehan Mingguk. Alang skari Kari Han-guk Tehan Mingguk (Han-guk) Cyoson Minjujuwi Yinmin Kunghwaguk (Cyoson) Tong-pey na Telu Tanah Tunux, Amerika, Aotearoa... Dndulan Kari Kari Pyon'ando. Kari Hamgyongdo. Kari Pyojun . Kari Cyonrado. Kari Kyongsangdo. Kari Ceju. Patis Wano 24 patis ka ga daha dooyun saya. Pnskngalan Hnghengak 19 hengak laqi tgberah na ka kari Han-guk: 23 hengak bubu na ka kari Han-guk: Duma kari Egu riyung ka kari Hanguk pneeyah Kari Telu, niqan 4 klegan na ka pnyahan kari Han-guk: Kari tnpusu :"ŽāėŽ¨ī(qhuni)","Ž¨ľ(qsiya)" Kari Patis Telu :"ŽĮľž£ľ(minsyu)","ŪēėŽ¨ľ(Ťć∑ÁČ©:Ha mul)" Kara pneeyah Dame :"žĽīŪď®ŪĄį(tennaw)","ŪĒĄŽ°úÍ∑łŽě® " Kari gnmaxan
S.PHON: ka…ĺi ńßan-guk (ka…ĺi ńßaŇčuk:***/*** ńßaŇčuk-…ôo) ux…ô d…ô k…ôsun dańßa ka…ĺi ¶joson w…ô (ka…ĺi ¶joson:***/*** ¶ńßos*n-mal), ka…ĺi qnlńßaŇčan na t…ôńßan miŇčguk (ńßan-guk) dańßa ka ¶joson min…üu…üuwi jinmin kuŇčńßwaguk ( ¶joson). **** maŇč kana ńß…ôi ka tnka…ĺi ńßan-guk/ ¶joson, tg** snp…ôgan bobo dńß…ô…ĺan nii. …ôgu …ĺijuŇč s…ô…ôdiq bobo dńß…ô…ĺan p…ĺadiŇč smluńß…ô ka…ĺi ńßan-guk, anu ka kndudul m…ĺana ka b…ôax na t…ôńßan miŇčguk. alaŇč ska…ĺi ka…ĺi ńßan-guk t…ôńßan miŇčguk (ńßan-guk) ¶joson min…üu…üuwi jinmin kuŇčńßwaguk ( ¶joson) toŇč-p…ô na t…ôlu tanańß tunux, am…ô…ĺika, aot…ôa…ĺoa... dndulan ka…ĺi ka…ĺi pjon'ando. ka…ĺi ńßamgjoŇčdo. ka…ĺi pjo…üun . ka…ĺi ¶jon…ĺado. ka…ĺi kjoŇčsaŇčdo. ka…ĺi ¶…ô…üu. patis wano ** patis ka ga dańßa doojun saja. pnskŇčalan ńßŇčńß…ôŇčak ** ńß…ôŇčak laqi tgb…ô…ĺańß na ka ka…ĺi ńßan-guk: ** ńß…ôŇčak bubu na ka ka…ĺi ńßan-guk: duma ka…ĺi …ôgu …ĺijuŇč ka ka…ĺi ńßaŇčuk pn…ô…ôańß ka…ĺi t…ôlu, niqan * kl…ôgan na ka pnjańßan ka…ĺi ńßan-guk: ka…ĺi tnpusu :"**(qńßuni)","*(qsija)" ka…ĺi patis t…ôlu :"**(minsju)","**(**:ńßa mul)" ka…ĺa pn…ô…ôańß dam…ô :"***(t…ônnaw)","**** " ka…ĺi gnmaxan
S.FORM: Kari Han-guk (Kari Hanguk:ŪēúÍĶ≠žĖī/ťüďŚúčŤ™ě Hanguk-eo) uxe de kesun daha Kari Cyoson we (Kari Cyoson:ž°įžĄ†Žßź/śúĚťģģŽßź Chos«ín-mal), kari qnlhangan na Tehan Mingguk (Han-guk) daha ka Cyoson Minjujuwi Yinmin Kunghwaguk (Cyoson). 7560 mang kana hei ka tnkari Han-guk/Cyoson, tg13 snpegan bobo dheran nii. Egu riyung seediq bobo dheran prading smluhe Kari Han-guk, anu ka kndudul mrana ka beyax na Tehan Mingguk. Alang skari Kari Han-guk Tehan Mingguk (Han-guk) Cyoson Minjujuwi Yinmin Kunghwaguk (Cyoson) Tong-pey na Telu Tanah Tunux, Amerika, Aotearoa... Dndulan Kari Kari Pyon'ando. Kari Hamgyongdo. Kari Pyojun . Kari Cyonrado. Kari Kyongsangdo. Kari Ceju. Patis Wano 24 patis ka ga daha dooyun saya. Pnskngalan Hnghengak 19 hengak laqi tgberah na ka kari Han-guk: 23 hengak bubu na ka kari Han-guk: Duma kari Egu riyung ka kari Hanguk pneeyah Kari Telu, niqan 4 klegan na ka pnyahan kari Han-guk: Kari tnpusu :"ŽāėŽ¨ī(qhuni)","Ž¨ľ(qsiya)" Kari Patis Telu :"ŽĮľž£ľ(minsyu)","ŪēėŽ¨ľ(Ťć∑ÁČ©:Ha mul)" Kara pneeyah Dame :"žĽīŪď®ŪĄį(tennaw)","ŪĒĄŽ°úÍ∑łŽě® " Kari gnmaxan
S.PHON: ka…ĺi ńßan-guk (ka…ĺi ńßaŇčuk:***/*** ńßaŇčuk-…ôo) ux…ô d…ô k…ôsun dańßa ka…ĺi ¶joson w…ô (ka…ĺi ¶joson:***/*** ¶ńßos*n-mal), ka…ĺi qnlńßaŇčan na t…ôńßan miŇčguk (ńßan-guk) dańßa ka ¶joson min…üu…üuwi jinmin kuŇčńßwaguk ( ¶joson). **** maŇč kana ńß…ôi ka tnka…ĺi ńßan-guk/ ¶joson, tg** snp…ôgan bobo dńß…ô…ĺan nii. …ôgu …ĺijuŇč s…ô…ôdiq bobo dńß…ô…ĺan p…ĺadiŇč smluńß…ô ka…ĺi ńßan-guk, anu ka kndudul m…ĺana ka b…ôax na t…ôńßan miŇčguk. alaŇč ska…ĺi ka…ĺi ńßan-guk t…ôńßan miŇčguk (ńßan-guk) ¶joson min…üu…üuwi jinmin kuŇčńßwaguk ( ¶joson) toŇč-p…ô na t…ôlu tanańß tunux, am…ô…ĺika, aot…ôa…ĺoa... dndulan ka…ĺi ka…ĺi pjon'ando. ka…ĺi ńßamgjoŇčdo. ka…ĺi pjo…üun . ka…ĺi ¶jon…ĺado. ka…ĺi kjoŇčsaŇčdo. ka…ĺi ¶…ô…üu. patis wano ** patis ka ga dańßa doojun saja. pnskŇčalan ńßŇčńß…ôŇčak ** ńß…ôŇčak laqi tgb…ô…ĺańß na ka ka…ĺi ńßan-guk: ** ńß…ôŇčak bubu na ka ka…ĺi ńßan-guk: duma ka…ĺi …ôgu …ĺijuŇč ka ka…ĺi ńßaŇčuk pn…ô…ôańß ka…ĺi t…ôlu, niqan * kl…ôgan na ka pnjańßan ka…ĺi ńßan-guk: ka…ĺi tnpusu :"**(qńßuni)","*(qsija)" ka…ĺi patis t…ôlu :"**(minsju)","**(**:ńßa mul)" ka…ĺa pn…ô…ôańß dam…ô :"***(t…ônnaw)","**** " ka…ĺi gnmaxan
